channel.title: Claude Developer Misery Index — Official Only
channel.description: Claude AI reliability based on official Anthropic status page only. No social chatter. Updated every 15 minutes.

image.title: Claude Developer Misery Index — Official Only

item.title: Official Status: 0.0/10 — ALL CLEAR
item.description: Official score: 0.0/10 (ALL CLEAR). Status: All Systems Operational.

item.title: [MAJOR] Email login down
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: major. Latest: Email login was broken between approximately 3:46 PM and 4:52 PM PDT on April 10, 2026.

item.title: [MINOR] Elevated errors on requests to Claude models
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: The issue affecting requests to non-Opus models has been resolved.

item.title: [MINOR] Some Claude.ai share links were inaccessible
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: Between April 2 and April 10, some users who were not signed in to Claude.ai (web, mobile, desktop) were not able to access some Claude.ai sharing links.

item.title: [MINOR] Degraded Performance on Vaults
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [MINOR] Elevated Connector Error Rates
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: This incident has been resolved.
